name: aether
description: Personal visual asset memory, visual memory browsing, prompt refinement, and explicit image generation workflow plugin for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Capture and browse visual assets, refine prompts, and record explicit image generations.
interface.longDescription: Aether helps you keep visual references, style notes, refined prompts, and image-generation history in one place. It turns image references into reusable visual memory, helps refine fuzzy prompts, and only records new image generation when you explicitly ask for it.
defaultPrompt: 帮我把这组参考图整理成可复用的视觉记忆。 / Help me turn these references into reusable visual memory.
打开 Aether 本地素材面板。 / Open the local Aether visual memory panel.
帮我列出已经保存的视觉记忆，并看看参考图。 / Show my saved visual memories and references.
帮我把这段模糊的生图提示词精修一下。 / Refine this fuzzy image prompt.
先帮我精修提示词，我确认后再生成图片并记录。 / Refine first, then generate after I confirm.
帮我局部修改这张已经生成的图片。 / Edit part of this generated image.
